texto: Adventures are to the adventurous. They abound on every side; but only the chosen few have the courage to embrace them. And they will not come to you; you must go out to seek them. Then they meet you half-way, and rush into your arms, for they know their true lovers.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Allen Grant sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Adventures are to the adventurous. They abound on every side; but only the chosen few have the co…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, adventure, adventures, útil em momentos de reflexao.

frase_original: Adventures are to the adventurous. They abound on every side; but only the chosen few have the courage to embrace them. And they will not come to you; you must go out to seek them. Then they meet you half-way, and rush into your arms, for they know their true lovers.
